summary: Essay summary (dossier) stage for transcendental-magic — new campaign per V9 freeze
description:
Campaign c1's span plan is FROZEN at 52 works (docs/summary/span-plan-c1.json); V9 rule in docs/summary/implementation-guru.md: different totals after generation has begun = new campaign, full stop. Adding this work changes totals, so DO NOT touch the c1 artifact.

Steps: bump campaign_id in config/dossiers.toml (c2 — or a scoped campaign if the config grows work-scoping; decide at implement time against §1.3.6), run build_dossiers.py --plan to emit span-plan-{campaign} freeze artifacts (json+md), then --generate --work transcendental-magic (all stages: l1, structure, l2, summary, context, figures, terms, notes). Review/respin per the PR#32 review-exporter flow if verdicts flag anything.

Depends on 7f392512 (chunks must exist and be final — span identity freezes on chunk TOMLs). If the two-text_id split was chosen in 7f392512, ensure the works.toml grouping lands BEFORE --plan so it plans as one work.

Done: freeze artifacts committed; dossier/summaries generated and stored for the transcendental-magic work; c1 artifacts untouched (git diff clean on span-plan-c1.*).
